raw: {"perspective": "Risk Manager", "findings": [{"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/schemas/assessment.py", "issue": "Hardcoded validation threshold of 0.5 in assessment data ingestion; no dynamic outlier detection for response times or incomplete submissions", "recommended_fix": "Replace static threshold with adaptive statistical bounds using IQR or z-score; add schema-level enforcement for required response fields and minimum response time (e.g., 1s)"}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "Data integrity compromise risks invalidating IRT calibration, leading to biased AURA scores and potential GDPR/ISO 10667-2 non-compliance.", "next_files_to_read": ["apps/api/app/routers/assessment.py", "scripts/audit_dif_bias.py"]}

findings.issue: Hardcoded validation threshold of 0.5 in assessment data ingestion; no dynamic outlier detection for response times or incomplete submissions
findings.recommended_fix: Replace static threshold with adaptive statistical bounds using IQR or z-score; add schema-level enforcement for required response fields and minimum response time (e.g., 1s)

whistleblower_flag: Data integrity compromise risks invalidating IRT calibration, leading to biased AURA scores and potential GDPR/ISO 10667-2 non-compliance.
